name_cn:
『Burberry』
Burberry exquisite wallet clutch is in stock! Selected vintage check pieces made of grained leather. Button closure with re-engraved new version logo. Includes detachable strap. Creates a mini bag effortlessly. Model 1621! Dimensions 20.5, 3, 12
